text:
The Kurta Clan Elder was the leader of the Kurta Clan. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Appearance

The Kurta Clan elder donned a green-colored Kurta garb with a gold lining. He had a grey beard and gray hair that would come to a spike on the top of his head. He also had a circular scar in the middle of his forehead. 

Personality

Due to the Kurta Clan's laws, the elder was strict and did not let anyone from the clan go to the 'outside world'. He thought the outside world to be a bad place full of people who would discriminate against the Kurta Clan. However, after reading Sheila's book, the elder honestly told Kurapika that it was a good book after all. 

Background

The elder was usually pestered by a young Kurapika, who would always ask to go to the 'outside world' and question their clan's rules. One day, the elder found the book that Sheila had given to Kurapika and hid it from him. The young boy approached him, and the elder agreed to give Kurapika a test. 

Six weeks later, the elder was killed by members of the Phantom Troupe and had his Scarlet Eyes stolen; the message "We reject no one, so take nothing from us" was left on the corpse of the elder, beside the burning Kurta village. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2
